title: External Staircase Refurbishment
caption: Corrosion and failed coatings removed from a residential block's steel escape stair ahead of repainting and anti-slip nosing.
beforeCaption: Heavy corrosion and flaking paint across the diamond-plate treads, with the original hazard signage still in place.
afterCaption: Close-up of the new anti-slip nosing and clean coating applied to every tread edge.
